name: AWS Certified Data Engineer – Associate (DEA-C01)
description: Associate-level certification for data engineers who implement and manage data pipelines on AWS. Validates ability to ingest, transform, and orchestrate data solutions. 1+ years hands-on experience with data engineering. 65 questions, 130 minutes.

domains.name: Data Ingestion and Transformation
domains.description: Domain 1 (34%): Choose appropriate data ingestion services (Kinesis, Glue, DMS). Design and implement data transformation solutions. Orchestrate data pipelines.

domains.name: Data Store Management
domains.description: Domain 2 (26%): Design data stores (S3, RDS, DynamoDB, Redshift). Manage data lifecycle, implement data catalog and schema management.

domains.name: Data Operations and Support
domains.description: Domain 3 (22%): Automate data processing, manage and monitor data pipelines, ensure data quality.

domains.name: Data Security and Governance
domains.description: Domain 4 (18%): Apply authentication and authorization mechanisms, implement data encryption, ensure data governance and compliance.
